_comment: Conservative-by-default work schedule. Agents wake ONLY inside working hours and ONLY on cadence; idle polls log a 'rest' and spend nothing. Going more aggressive is an evals-gated promotion the operator approves (doctrine §8). Edit freely — this is policy, not code.

jobs.command: compile the morning brief: what needs me, money, and today's priorities
scan SAM.gov and state portals for new janitorial opportunities; score bid/no-bid
check the fiverr inbox for new gigs and prepare drafts
new support tickets came in — triage and draft replies
check the rodgate inbox for awards and replies
read + triage the personal inbox, digest what needs a reply, queue gated cleanup
weekly strategy review: KPIs, human-edit rate, where to push or pull back
check bid response deadlines and remind before any close (deterministic, no LLM)
check tax deadlines (1040-ES/1099-NEC/1065/1040) and push the final-stage ones (deterministic, no LLM)
push the daily gov growth digest — fresh quick wins + teaming primes, one Telegram, weekdays only (deterministic, no LLM; the route dedups to one per day)
log the end-of-day summary to the Notion company brain (deterministic, no LLM)
